core_requirements: Do not mix domain-specific logic into the solver.
Represent states, transitions, probabilities, rewards, and terminal conditions explicitly.
Separate output formatting from contribution analysis.
Keep estimated, assumed, unknown values out of confirmed values.

model_layers.OutputResult: Result object for display or downstream use.
model_layers.ContributionResult: Contribution and sensitivity object kept separate from output.

primitive_specs.RewardSpec: ScalarSpec used for transition reward or cost.

compatibility_policy.probability_number: Existing numeric probability definitions remain valid.
compatibility_policy.reward_number: Existing numeric reward definitions remain valid.
compatibility_policy.to_state_id: Existing explicit to-state transitions remain valid and are still used by the current solver.
compatibility_policy.constant_spec: Constant spec is evaluated to the same numeric value before solving.
compatibility_policy.transition_effects: Transition effects are preserved and can be applied by helper functions, but automatic state-space generation is intentionally not implemented in this step.
compatibility_policy.future_formula_specs: Formula/reference specs are intentionally not implemented in this step.
